mapper.select: SELECT s.id AS sessionId, s.title, m.content AS lastMessage, s.last_message_at AS lastMessageAt, s.created_at AS createdAt FROM chat_session s LEFT JOIN chat_message m ON m.id = ( SELECT cm.id FROM chat_message cm WHERE cm.session_id = s.id AND cm.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY cm.created_at DESC, cm.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY COALESCE(s.last_message_at, s.created_at) DESC, s.id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM chat_session s WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.is_deleted = 0
